title: lasianthaea fruticosa var. occidentalis
intro: Lasianthaea fruticosa var. occidentalis, also known as the Western Lasianthaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lasianthaea fruticosa var. occidentalis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
